$comment: GENERATED from docs/phases/tool_schema.v0.json — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make ui-gen` (ui/app/scripts/gen_tool_labels.py).

get_versions.label: Get versions
get_versions.description: All gate-visible Versions of a Work with typed relationship labels and the original flagged. scope maps to version.country; include_sequels walks work-level is_sequel_of edges transitively; a sequel work's own original is labelled is_sequel_of relative to the queried work; a version with no verified edge carries relationship=null.

get_work.label: Get work
get_work.description: Canonical Work node + metadata, incl. the literary source_work when one exists (GS-05).

refine_filter.label: Refine filter
refine_filter.description: Narrow a conversational version set (GS-08 backtracking). era resolves against the set's original version's year: newer = strictly later, older = strictly earlier, original = the is_original flag.

resolve_title.label: Resolve title
resolve_title.description: Resolve a (possibly transliterated / misspelled / code-mixed) title to candidate Works/Versions. score = rapidfuzz-normalized 0-1 over the match-key index (exact key hit = 1.0); ambiguous = candidates span more than one Work.

search_by_plot.label: Search by plot
search_by_plot.description: Semantic retrieval of Works from a plot/story description (P2 implements; schema frozen now). abstain=true below the calibrated NO_MATCH threshold (GS-02).
